title: Menu
text: Menu A Menu is a Development Object that defines a Uniface menu bar, dropdown menu, or pop-up menu for a desktop application. It is cannot be used in web applications. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: men Main Development Object? No Part of: Menu Library Contains: Property , Code Container Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: MenuName @ LibraryName @ Language .men URI format: lib: LibraryName.Language :men: MenuName Specialization Uniface Menu specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a Menu Library as parent. It does not have child development objects. Note: It is possible to implement menus using other mechanisms, such as tabs, popup windows, and contained forms. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
